arts.ttl: O'Brien opens door to Swansea return next season
arts.sum: Lewis O'Brien says he would "definitely" be open to re-joining Swansea City next season if the Championship club were to agree a deal with Nottingham Forest.

arts.ttl: Hull City told what key ingredient is needed for Championship survival
arts.sum: Ruben Selles' men battled back from the setback of conceding a second own goal in four games against the Sky Blues, before fighting back to earn a big point courtesy of Abu Kamara's finish, a response which impressed Boateng . He believes the biggest positive going into their Good Friday game was the fact Selles' men battled back to get a point.

arts.ttl: Drameh starts: Hull City team news and predicted XI to face Swansea City
arts.sum: Hull City are back in Championship action on Friday afternoon with an away trip to Swansea City in… The post Drameh starts: Hull City team news and predicted XI to face Swansea City appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Hull City are two matches away from Ruben Selles' dream Championship scenario
arts.sum: Should they find a way to get two wins over this weekend, and the Bluebirds were to lose at Sheffield United on Friday and then lose at home to a resurgent Oxford United side, with Luton and Plymouth dropping points, then their safety would be confirmed before that visit of Derby County and then what at this stage, looks a daunting trip to Fratton Park on the final day. The Easter weekend often goes a long way to dictating what happens in the final reckoning, and it will be no different this year with only two games left once it's come and gone.

arts.ttl: Championship: Predictions for all 12 games on Friday
arts.sum: The Easter weekend double header in the Championship usually has major repercussions at both ends of the table and Tom McGarry is on hand to provide a score prediction for all 12 games in the second tier on Good Friday.

arts.ttl: Championship relegation run-in compared as Hull City and their rivals face moment of truth
arts.sum: Arguably Luton have the toughest run-in on paper with the Hatters facing Derby, Bristol City, Coventry and West Brom, while Cardiff and Plymouth's is equally tough. Just four games remain in the battle to stay in the Championship, and for the clubs at the wrong end of the league, the final two weeks of the season promises to be a nervous affair.

arts.ttl: Hull City injury update regarding Lewie Coyle emerges ahead of Swansea City trip
arts.sum: Hull City head coach Ruben Selles has said skipper Lewie Coyle is expected to be available for their… The post Hull City injury update regarding Lewie Coyle emerges ahead of Swansea City trip appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Coventry City chief Frank Lampard makes Hull City weakness confession
arts.sum: Coventry City manager Frank Lampard admits he was aware of Hull City's issues at the start of the second half in games after watching his side become the latest to take advantage of the Tigers' slow start. For the third time in the four games since the international break, City conceded inside the opening 10 minutes of the second half, with Matt Grimes the latest to take full advantage with a scrambled volley which hit Charlie Hughes and found its way into the back of the net just a minute in.
